auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Ayrshare Primary Profile API key sent as Authorization: Bearer API_KEY. Find it in the Ayrshare dashboard API Key page: https://app.ayrshare.com/api-key.

extraFields.label: Profile Key
extraFields.description: Optional Ayrshare User Profile key sent as the Profile-Key header for Business and Enterprise profile requests. Find it from the Ayrshare dashboard user profile management page: https://app.ayrshare.com/profiles.

actions.name: check_post_length
actions.description: Check weighted social post length and platform validity using Ayrshare's post length validator.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for checking Ayrshare post length.

maxCharLimits.description: Maximum character limits keyed by platform.

validByPlatform.description: Whether the post is valid for each platform.

weightedLengthByPlatform.description: Weighted post lengths keyed by platform.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Ayrshare post length result.

actions.name: delete_post
actions.description: Delete one or more Ayrshare posts, delete all pending scheduled posts, or mark a post as manually deleted.

id.description: The top-level Ayrshare post ID returned by publish_post.

items.description: The top-level Ayrshare post ID returned by publish_post.

bulk.description: Ayrshare post IDs to bulk delete.

deleteAllScheduled.description: Whether to delete all pending scheduled posts for the profile.

markManualDeleted.description: Whether to mark the Ayrshare post as deleted without deleting it from the social networks.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting Ayrshare posts. Provide id, bulk, or deleteAllScheduled.

anyOf.description: The Ayrshare post ID when returned for a single delete.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

results.description: Per-platform or per-post delete results returned by Ayrshare.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

actions.name: get_post
actions.description: Get one Ayrshare post by top-level Ayrshare post ID, including status and per-platform results.

id.description: The top-level Ayrshare post ID returned by publish_post.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Ayrshare post.

anyOf.description: The top-level Ayrshare post ID when returned.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

postIds.description: Per-platform post results returned by Ayrshare.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

actions.name: get_post_analytics
actions.description: Get real-time analytics for an Ayrshare post, optionally limited to selected social platforms.

id.description: The top-level Ayrshare post ID returned by publish_post.

items.description: The social network platform name accepted by Ayrshare.

platforms.description: Optional social platforms to include in the Ayrshare request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Ayrshare post analytics.

anyOf.description: The top-level Ayrshare post ID when returned.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

postIds.description: Per-platform analytics results returned by Ayrshare.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

errors.description: Per-platform analytics errors returned by Ayrshare.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Ayrshare post analytics result.

actions.name: get_user_profile
actions.description: Get Ayrshare account or user profile details, including linked social accounts and usage metadata.

instagramDetails.description: Whether Ayrshare should include slower additional Instagram details.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Ayrshare user or profile details.

items.description: The social network platform name accepted by Ayrshare.

activeSocialAccounts.description: The linked social network accounts currently active for the profile.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

displayNames.description: The social account display records returned by Ayrshare.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Ayrshare user profile details.

actions.name: list_post_history
actions.description: List Ayrshare post history with optional filters for date range, status, type, and social platforms.

limit.description: The maximum number of history records to return.

items.description: The social network platform name accepted by Ayrshare.

platforms.description: The social platforms to include in the history filter.

startDate.description: The inclusive ISO 8601 start date for history results.

endDate.description: The inclusive ISO 8601 end date for history results.

lastDays.description: The number of previous days to include, or 0 for all history.

status.description: The Ayrshare post status to filter by.

type.description: Whether to return immediate or scheduled posts.

autoRepostId.description: The auto repost ID to filter by, or all for every auto repost.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Ayrshare post history.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

posts.description: The post history records returned by Ayrshare.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Ayrshare post history result.

actions.name: publish_post
actions.description: Publish or schedule a social media post through Ayrshare using a JSON-friendly first-pass field set.

post.description: The post text to send to the selected social platforms.

anyOf.description: The social network platform name accepted by Ayrshare.
The all-platform shortcut accepted by Ayrshare.

items.description: An Ayrshare social platform or the all shortcut.

platforms.description: The social platforms to publish to, or all to publish to every linked platform.

items.description: An HTTPS media URL Ayrshare can retrieve.

mediaUrls.description: HTTPS image or video URLs to include in the post.

isVideo.description: Whether the media URLs should be treated as video media.

scheduleDate.description: The UTC ISO 8601 datetime when Ayrshare should publish the post.

validateScheduled.description: Whether Ayrshare should validate a scheduled post before accepting it.

idempotencyKey.description: A unique idempotency key used to reject duplicate post submissions.

notes.description: Internal notes stored with the post and retrievable from history.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for publishing or scheduling a post with Ayrshare.

anyOf.description: The Ayrshare post ID when returned at the top level.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

postIds.description: Per-platform publish results returned by Ayrshare.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Ayrshare publish post result.

actions.name: retry_post
actions.description: Retry an Ayrshare post whose previous publish attempt failed, returning the new pending post status.

id.description: The top-level Ayrshare post ID returned by publish_post.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrying an Ayrshare post.

anyOf.description: The Ayrshare post ID returned for the retry.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

actions.name: update_post
actions.description: Update mutable Ayrshare post metadata such as scheduleDate, approval status, notes, pause state, comments, or YouTube visibility.

id.description: The top-level Ayrshare post ID returned by publish_post.

approved.description: Whether to approve a post awaiting approval.

disableComments.description: Whether to disable comments on supported social platforms.

notes.description: Reference notes stored with the Ayrshare post.

scheduleDate.description: The UTC datetime when Ayrshare should publish the scheduled post.

scheduledPause.description: Whether to pause or unpause a scheduled Ayrshare post.

visibility.description: The visibility to set on a posted YouTube video.

title.description: The YouTube video title to update.

description.description: The YouTube video description to update.

categoryId.description: The YouTube category ID to update.

youTubeOptions.description: YouTube metadata to update on a posted video.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating an Ayrshare post. Provide at least one update field in addition to id.

anyOf.description: The Ayrshare post ID when returned.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

actions.name: validate_post
actions.description: Validate an Ayrshare post payload before publishing, including platform and media URL checks.

items.description: The social network platform name accepted by Ayrshare.

platforms.description: The social platforms to validate the post against.

items.description: An HTTPS media URL Ayrshare can retrieve.

mediaUrls.description: HTTPS image or video URLs to validate with the post.

isVideo.description: Whether the media URLs should be treated as video media.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for validating an Ayrshare post.

valid.description: Whether Ayrshare accepted the post payload as valid.

items.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

actions.name: verify_media_url
actions.description: Verify that a media URL exists and is accessible to Ayrshare.

mediaUrl.description: The media URL Ayrshare should verify.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for verifying an Ayrshare media URL.

anyOf.description: The upstream HTTP status code for the media URL.
The upstream HTTP status text for the media URL.
The media content type returned by Ayrshare.

exists.description: Whether Ayrshare reported the media URL as reachable.

raw.description: The raw response object returned by Ayrshare.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Ayrshare media URL verification result.
